mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of FEDFUNDS decline are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate decline below 4.0% signals tightening labor markets, boosting corporate earnings visibility and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in UNRATE < 4.0% periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or correlation with UNRATE < 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth above 3.0% indicates robust economic demand, driving corporate revenue growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in GDPC1 > 3.0% periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.05 over 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS above thresholds signal inflationary pressures and rate hikes, creating headwinds for equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in CPIAUCSL > 3.5% and FEDFUNDS > 4.0% periods are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or interaction effect size < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly industrial production growth above 1.0% signals expanding supply capacity, improving corporate margins, and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns during late-cycle expansions.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in INDPRO > 1.0% periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or correlation < 0.20 during late-cycle regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly housing starts above 1.5 million units indicate strong demand for construction, boosting related sectors and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in HOUST > 1.5M periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.05 over 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly payroll gains above 200k signal strong labor market demand, increasing consumer spending, and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in PAYEMS > 200k periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or correlation < 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly retail sales growth above 0.8% indicates strong consumer demand, improving corporate revenue visibility, and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in RSAFS > 0.8% periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year windows.
